title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
slides: Gemini now generates images for free—but what’s the catch?
It adapts images to your past conversations and preferences.
Only US users get this—and it learns from your data.
You can generate a custom avatar without design skills.
Test it now—ask for your own portrait and check the result.
thread_text:
1. Free images with a price

Gemini now generates visuals for free — but it mines your chat history to tailor them.

2. Hidden data learning

Only US users get access, where the feature learns from your personal data and past conversations.

3. Custom avatars unlocked

You can generate a custom portrait without any design skill — just type your request.

4. What it really costs

Your preferences shape every image, meaning the AI builds a profile from your prompts.

5. Test it yourself now

Ask Gemini for your own portrait today and check if you're comfortable with what it remembers.
video_script: But it learns your past chats.
Only US users get this feature.
You can make an avatar easily.
Test it and see the catch.

script: But it learns your past chats.
Only US users get this feature.
You can make an avatar easily.
Test it and see the catch.

instagram.caption:
Your past conversations with Gemini are now being used to generate personalized images for free — but only if you're in the US. 🖼️

It learns your preferences and chat history to tailor every image it creates, from custom avatars to portraits. No design skills needed — just type your request.

For anyone making content, this cuts the time spent on visuals, but your prompts are building a profile of your style and habits. 🤖

Try asking for your own portrait — are you okay with what it remembers about you?
